calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-15-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Patricia J. Van Steenberge CSR# 1742. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2007 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-15-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Richard Palenchar, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff. Case has settled. Court ordered case scheduled for an Order to Show Cause re: Dismissal pursuant to CRC 3.1385 on 5/15/2007 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez, CSR# 7782. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2006 Continued To Mar-12-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 3/12/2007 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Floyd L. Butler, CSR#2518. (212)
